sinopsis_cat:
Tradicions només les que ens inventem nosaltres.

Un any més tancarem el festival amb un cabaret conduit pel duo dinàmic format per Edoardo de Montis i Salvatore Frasca i pel qual passaran artistes amigues i estrelles del rock que han vingut al Kontrast per actuar-hi o de visita, poc ens importa.

La qüestió és ajuntar-nos i gaudir de números de circ (o del que sigui) d’alt nivell i sobretot riure molt, que amb els temps que corren fa bastanta falta.
sinopsis_eng:
Sunday 19/04 - 8:00 PM
Traditions only the ones we invent ourselves.
Once again we will close the festival with a cabaret conducted by the dynamic duo formed by Edoardo de Montis and Salvatore Frasca, and through which artist friends and rock stars who have come to Kontrast to perform or to visit will pass by — it matters little to us.
The point is to come together and enjoy high-level circus numbers (or whatever it may be) and above all to laugh a lot, which in the times we are living through is very much needed.
